Storage unavailable — do NOT close this tab before exporting.
A different session's saved data was found and removed. Starting fresh.
Wider view — the spot is inside the amber box. Pinch to zoom.

What this session is: a short follow-up — a mix of the card kinds you have already seen, at your own pace; answers save automatically.

Some cards show one letter or sign softly highlighted like क्ष — the only question is whether that spot matches the scan. Other cards show one whole verse — does it match the scan word for word? Correct / Wrong (please type what the scan shows) / Unsure — unsure is always fine.

The last card shows one phrase from the scan up close and asks which spelling it shows — just tap the one you see.

A few cards are deliberate checks of our own system — nothing to do differently, just answer what you see.

At the end: the observations box, then Export → Copy → paste back.
